name: Four Wood Golf Club
address: 828 Pico Blvd Suite 5, Santa Monica, CA 90405
about: Four Wood Golf is Santa Monica's premier indoor golf club, blending state-of-the-art simulator technology with a refined, social atmosphere. The venue features spacious bays equipped with Uneekor EYE XO launch monitors and GSPro software, allowing players to experience over 1,000 world-famous courses. Beyond the screens, the facility offers an urban clubhouse environment complete with a lounge bar serving a casual menu of classics, curated drinks, and craft coffee.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Uneekor EYE XO launch monitors provide precise data
Spacious 250 sq ft bays utilizing GSPro software for realistic course play
Full-service lounge bar with food and drinks available in the bays
No dress codes or stuffy rules in a relaxed social atmosphere
Active community with leagues, tournaments, and weekly scrambles
PGA professional instruction available using high-speed video analysis

food_and_drink.notes: All-day menu of clubhouse classics including burgers, chicken sandwiches, and lobster rolls
Curated beer and wine list served at The Lounge Bar

simulator_hardware.notes: Used in all bays and teaching studios

amenities_list: Lounge Bar|Food Menu|Changing Rooms|WiFi|Club Storage|Events Space|PGA Instruction|High-Speed Camera Analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While bringing your own clubs is recommended for familiarity, the venue is equipped to support your gear, and rentals may be available upon inquiry.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as Four Wood Golf offers a full kitchen and bar service with a curated menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round on the simulator typically takes about 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the pace of play and group size.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Four Wood Golf is family-friendly and offers a Family Membership specifically designed for parents and children.
